title: Pabstiella bicolor
taxonomy: Pabstiella bicolor is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly referred to as the orchid family. This classification places it within the larger group of flowering plants, known as angiosperms. Within the orchid family, Pabstiella bicolor is further classified as a genus of orchids, specifically within the tribe Epidendreae. The species is native to the Americas and is often found growing in shaded, humid environments. The classification of Pabstiella bicolor is subject to ongoing research and may be refined as new information becomes available.
